title: channel-attributable first_open event
description: Final output of mobile-attribution-integrator. One event per device first launch, with the acquisition channel joined from MMP / Install Referrer / AdServices / SKAN. Keep field names aligned with the analytics event taxonomy (analytics-integrator / tag-manager-integrator). Never invent a channel for unmatched installs — use matched_by=none|skan_aggregate.

matched_by.description: 조인 출처. 결정론 매칭 우선순위: mmp > install_referrer > adservices > skan_aggregate.

deferred_deeplink.description: 설치 후 라우팅할 의도된 URL. 라우팅 자체는 deeplink-integrator 가 처리.
